$comment: Per-page extraction schema. The STRUCTURAL fields (title, meta, h1, heading_counts, heading_outline, internal_links, unique_internal_targets, external_link_count, tables_count, schema_types, word_count_total, image_count) are produced ACCURATELY by scripts/extract_page.py parsing the raw HTML. The SEMANTIC fields (sections[].summary, faqs, examples, features_or_riders, numbers, author/reviewer/dates, readability_note) are layered on by the page-extractor agent via WebFetch. Keep field names stable — build_report.py and gap-analyst depend on them.
